# backend/routers/agent_supervisor.py
# auto-generated explainer · 2026-06-12T10:01:54Z

## Purpose
Live agent supervisor API.

Read-only HTTP wrapper around the Redis-backed agent fleet state. This powers
frontend command-center visibility without shell access.

## Imports
- from `__future__` import annotations
- from `_` import json
- from `_` import time
- from `collections` import Counter
- from `datetime` import datetime, timezone
- from `pathlib` import Path
- from `typing` import Any
- from `_` import redis
- from `fastapi` import APIRouter, Query
- from `core.config` import get_settings

(no CLI / env inputs — library module or implicit)

- `_result_is_failure(item)`: (no docstring)

- `_empty_unavailable_report(detail)`: (no docstring)
- `get_agent_supervisor_report(sample)`: Return live Redis queue, heartbeat, schedule, and recent-result state.
